Stocks This Week: Buy The NASDAQ ETFs And Hold Technology Stocks
10 Nasdaq-100 ETFs and Mutual Funds to Buy
Surprising Analyst 12-Month Target For The ProShares Ultra QQQ ETF

holdings.infoBox: QLD is an equity ETF with a total of 127 individual holdings.

overview.description: The ProShares Ultra QQQ (QLD) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the NASDAQ 100 index. The fund provides 2x leveraged exposure to a modified market-cap-weighted index of 100 large non-financial stocks listed on NASDAQ. QLD was launched on Jun 19, 2006 and is issued by ProShares.
